options.name: -buf_only
options.description: all placed buffers, and their connected nets, will be considered for pushed down

options.name: -check_only
options.description: simply inform which nets are going to be pushed down

options.name: -exclude_ptn_list
options.description: list of partition name(s) which are excluded from push down of instances/nets

options.name: -file
options.description: file containing list of net names to be considered for pushed down

options.name: -filter
options.description: only instances/nets whose name matches this specified regular expression will be pushed down

options.name: -inst_prefix
options.description: specifies a custom prefix for instances that are pushed down

options.name: -insts
options.description: all placed instances, and their connected nets, will be considered for pushed down

options.name: -logical_only
options.description: logically pushes down network into overlapping partitions

options.name: -net_prefix
options.description: specifies a custom prefix for nets that are pushed down

options.name: -nets
options.description: list of net names, and their connected instances, will be considered for pushed down

options.name: -output
options.description: file name in which net names, to be pushded down, will be mentioned; to be used with -check_only

options.name: -output_logical_only_nets
options.description: file name containing net names; to be used with -logical_only

options.name: -output_nets_for_wire_distribution
options.description: <string> output the user specified nets, so that they can be used later during partition command

options.name: -ptn_net_dir
options.description: directory in which net names corresponding net names in each partition, will be mentioned
